name_en: Bottega Veneta BVII new color-block Gemelli Gemelli double bag is deeply loved, now also released a color-block style~ New woven beautiful bag~ Unique and premium. Artistic woven style shows simple and premium charm. Every style reveals a generous temperament. I'm falling more in love with the Bottega Veneta vibe. #
